children.label: a
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to provide supplementary unemployment insurance under not to exceed $5,000,000.section 909 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated for new career training assistance under not to exceed $1,500,000.section 911 of this title

children.label: c
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Board to carry out its administrative expenses under this chapter and the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act [ et seq.] not to exceed $750,000. Effective , there is authorized to be appropriated to the Board an additional $1,000,000 to carry out its administrative expenses under this chapter and the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act [ et seq.].45 U.S.C. 100145 U.S.C. 1001October 1, 1980

children.label: d
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated $15,000,000 for purposes of providing transaction assistance in accordance with section 825(h)(1)(A) and (B) of this title.

children.label: e
children.text: Amounts appropriated under this section are authorized to remain available until expended.
